HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Margaret A. Seltzer's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection Of Documents is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion.
Counsel are advised to meet and confer as to the adequacy of the supplemental responses. Counsel are further advised that a response is required to Form Interrogatory 12.2. Any documents being withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege must be identified with particularity.
Plaintiff's objections to the declaration of Margaret Seltzer are overruled.
Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $90, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
